stemHtml: Which statement is correct regarding the Drag Divergence Mach number (MDRAG DIVERGENCE)?

options.a: Drag Divergence Mach number is close to, and always less than M<sub>CRIT</sub>.
options.b: Drag Divergence Mach number is greater than M<sub>CRIT</sub>, except for supercritical wings where it is slightly less than M<sub>CRIT</sub>.
options.c: Drag Divergence Mach number is slightly less than M<sub>CRIT</sub>, except for supercritical wings where it is greater than M<sub>CRIT</sub>.
options.d: Drag Divergence Mach number is close to, and always greater than M<sub>CRIT</sub>.
